      • nextChunk

        public Status nextChunk()
        Description copied from interface: AdjListOffsetArrowChunkReader
        Sets chunk position indicator to next chunk. if current chunk is the last chunk, will return Status::IndexError error.
        Specified by:
        nextChunk in interface AdjListOffsetArrowChunkReader

      • nativeNextChunk

        public static @com.alibaba.fastffi.FFINameAlias("next_chunk"),@com.alibaba.fastffi.CXXValue long nativeNextChunk​(long ptr,
                                                                                                                 long rv_base)

      • seek

        public Status seek​(@com.alibaba.fastffi.FFINameAlias("GraphArchive::IdType") long id)
        Description copied from interface: AdjListOffsetArrowChunkReader
        Sets chunk position indicator for reader by internal vertex id. If internal vertex id is not found, will return Status::IndexError error. After seeking to an invalid vertex id, the next call to GetChunk function may undefined, e.g. return a non exist path.
        Specified by:
        seek in interface AdjListOffsetArrowChunkReader
        Parameters:
        id - the internal vertex id.

      • nativeSeek

        public static @com.alibaba.fastffi.CXXValue long nativeSeek​(long ptr,

                                                            long id0)
